source_message: Oracle OOS 06-16: B short, Reversal (swing-tier bear MSS), bias-ALIGNED bearish. Entry 30864.25 (09:56 1m bearish close — MSS-leg FVG retrace into 30883.75-30894.25, CE 30889, from the 08:24 swing bear MSS leg; 09:55 high tapped CE exactly + swept AS.H/NYAM.H). Stop 30905.00 (user-corrected first-FVG-candle invalidation; not the tighter 30896 CE/FVG-high proxy). Executable no-lookahead TP1 30750.75 (user-corrected anchor, hit at 10:20 ET). LO.L 30783 / AS.L 30755 and runner NYAM.L 30561.75 are draw/runner context; NYAM.L was reached later but is not forced into the 09:57 ET executable packet. Move: high 30869.75 @09:55 -> broke down 10:20 -> bottom NYAM.L 30561.75 @10:59.

oracle_target_context.note: Draw/runner context from the oracle note; executable expected fields stay aligned to the no-lookahead packet-time fold. B execution banks TP1.
